D

dataBaseUpdatedTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.CreateEventActivityTest
test to see if event created is uploaded to the database
declinedHistoryStatusShownTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MyWaitlistActivityTest
Test that the waitlist history displays when a user was not selected or later declined.
decrementWaitlistCount(int) - Static method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
return a number 1 less than the argument unless negative then 0
decrementWaitlistCount_decreasesByOne() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepositoryTest
Verifies that decrementWaitlistCount decreases the current waitlist count by one.
decrementWaitlistCount_doesNotGoBelowZero() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepositoryTest
Verifies that decrementWaitlistCount never returns a value below zero.
deleteAccountTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.SettingsActivityTest
test to see if a user can delete their profile if they no longer wish to use the app
deleteComment(String, String) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
Soft-deletes a comment from an event while preserving the thread structure.
deleteNotification(String, String) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationRepository
Deletes a specific notification from a user's inbox
deleteProfileTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserProfileDetailsActivityTest
Test if the admin can remove a user profile
